---
title: "Indianapolis, Indiana Waste Collection Cost of Service Study"
year: 2021
image: /images/indianapolis_IN.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Indianapolis, Indiana"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

Mr. Bell was subcontracted to complete a cost of service study for the City of
Indianapolis Solid Waste Services Division (Division). The purpose of the study
was to understand the specific costs of the various services provided by the
Division, document the operational metrics, understand the financial impact of
regular equipment replacement, compare expenses to City contracted service
providers, understand the impact of the City's recycling program, and to
prepare baseline costs and rates for future service procurement.
:::
